title: The Boy And The Bath [Horror, not a Dweller] [Doctor Nowhere]
description: A smart and full of surprises horror-ish entity. Based on Doctor Nowhere.
body:
# **[Old dweller version of the mod can be found here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-bath)**
# **[Community discord can be found here!](https://discord.gg/NE6fdKPXFG)**

## **In general**, mod aims to make the game scarier and creepier, using a picture of a boy abandoned in the bath by his parents guy called Guilt from the analog horror series Doctor Nowhere, who wants revenge. Mod adds a complex entity, who will stalk you around you world in different forms and in unsetting situations. Mod is kinda slowburn and really unpredictable.
## 
**Mod requires Geckolib.
Mod CONTAINS screamers and loud sounds.
Entitys spawnrate can be configured through a config file.
Mod is NOT intended to play in Multiplayer worlds / SMPs.**

_For all the bedrock porters: do not port the mod, plz. If u do > action will be taken > there is no ur channel and stuff ✅. Not giving anyone permissions btw <<<< !!!!!_
